High tier: strong carries, scarce in the pool.  12 heroes at this cost.

### Aurora  (id 36, cost 4)

- **Class:** Stargazer  ·  **Faction:** Astro Power  ·  **Position:** Back-row
- **Skill (Hailstone Blast):** Aurora summons an Icy Meteorite, dealing (+200% Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG to enemies within medium range. (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit.) Multiple Meteorites then fall, dealing (+75% Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG 5 time(s). (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit.)
- **Magic Bonus (1/2/3 star):** 200% / 210% / 500%

- **Class:** Dauntless  ·  **Faction:** Heartbond  ·  **Position:** Front-row
- **Skill (Falling Starmoon):** Esmeralda coheres the power of Astrospace, gaining Shield equal to 8% of Max HP for 4s. - **Class:** Assassin  ·  **Faction:** Dragoncaller  ·  **Position:** Front-row
- **Skill (Shadowblade Slaughter):** Gusion throws multiple daggers forward and recalls them, each dealing (+90% Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG on hit.
